Book a stay
Home·Experiences

Days you won't
want to end

Swim, sail, spa, repeat. Everything at Royal Hotel is built around one idea — that the best holidays are the ones where you do exactly as little, or as much, as you like.

The resort

On the property

Pools & rooftop bar

Three pools cascading to the sand, daybeds, and a rooftop bar from breakfast to sundowners.

The spa

Five treatment rooms, a sea-facing sauna, and therapists who know how to undo a long year.

Sea-to-table dining

Two restaurants and a sunset bar. The produce arrives at dawn; the Cape's best wines pour all night.

Things to do

From your door, outward

Catamaran sundowners

A skippered sail along the Atlantic seaboard with a glass in hand, leaving from the beach below.

Table Mountain

The cableway is ten minutes away; we'll book your slot and a car to skip the queue.

Surf & SUP

Boards, wetsuits and a morning lesson on the gentle break right out front, for all levels.

Winelands day trips

An hour to Stellenbosch and Franschhoek — we'll plan the route and the lunch reservation.

A look

Out and about

Plan it, or don't

Tell us what you're after — or nothing at all — and we'll shape the days around you. The beach does the rest.

Book a staySee the gallery
RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.

Open dates, seasonal offers and the occasional recipe from the kitchen. No spam.
